span.p: Reused across many flows / makers / apps?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Raw HTTP action with Entra auth
(or HTTP-with-Microsoft-Entra-ID connector)
simplest for a one-off

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Raw HTTP action
key as a secure input / env-var, NOT inline

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Custom connector (tenant-private)
match auth to the API: OAuth2/Entra · API key · none-if-public
+ policy templates to pin host/headers
+ classify in DLP

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Certified (public) connector
multi-week Microsoft review — only worth it for ISV distribution
